title: cuphea palustris
intro: Cuphea palustris, also known as swamp firecracker or wildfox, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lythraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cuphea palustris include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
